summary: Completed testing of Blendlink iteration 33 bug fixes and new features: Minting (500 BL deduction), BL coin bet in PvP (deduction on join, refund on cancel), Battle start, and Photo selection with stamina. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend Photo Game Arena verified with photo selection UI, stamina display, and dollar value sorting.
passed_tests: Minting Status: /api/minting/status returns can_mint, mints_today, daily_limit
Minting Photos: /api/minting/photos returns user's minted photos
Battle Photos: /api/photo-game/battle-photos returns photos sorted by dollar_value
Battle Photos: Photos include stamina, stamina_percent, is_available, battles_remaining
Photo Game Stats: /api/photo-game/stats returns stamina and battle stats
PvP Queue Status: /api/photo-game/pvp/queue-status returns players_waiting, active_matches
PvP Find Match: /api/photo-game/pvp/find-match with photo_id works
BL Coin Bet: Bet deducted when joining matchmaking queue
BL Coin Bet: Bet refunded when canceling matchmaking
frontend_tests_passed: Games page: Photo Battle Arena CTA visible with NEW badge
Games page: User balance displayed (32,900 BL)
Battle Arena: Page loads with 'Select Your Battle Photo' UI
Battle Arena: Photo card shows name, dollar value ($86.8M), scenery type (Water)
Battle Arena: Stamina display shows 88% (21 battles left)
Battle Arena: Strength indicator shows 'Strong vs Man-made'
Battle Arena: Stats bar shows Wins, Losses, BL Won, Stamina (92/100)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in photo_game.py start_game function - added _id removal before returning session
Minting correctly deducts 500 BL coins and tracks daily limit
BL coin bet is properly deducted when joining matchmaking and refunded on cancel
Photo stamina tracking works correctly (100% = 24 battles, ~4.16% per battle)
Battle photos endpoint returns photos sorted by dollar_value descending with stamina info
seed_data_creation: Created test photo 'Test Battle Photo 1' via minting API for battle testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified: 1) Minting deducts 500 BL and tracks daily limit correctly, 2) BL coin bet is deducted when joining PvP matchmaking queue and refunded on cancel, 3) Battle start works with skip_bet_deduction flag for PvP flow, 4) Photo stamina tracked per-photo (100% = 24 battles, regenerates ~4.16%/hour). Test user has 1 minted photo 'Test Battle Photo 1' with ~88% stamina. Fixed ObjectId serialization issue in photo_game.py.
